inputs.text:
[SUBJECT & COMPOSITION]
The image depicts an 18-year-old woman taking an intimate close selfie, captured in a vertical frame from just above her head to the upper chest. The camera perspective is a classic smartphone selfie, held slightly above eye level in her right hand and angled downward. The composition is tightly centered on her face, with her shoulders and upper torso filling the lower third of the frame. Her posture is relaxed and leaning slightly forward, creating a direct, engaging connection with the lens. Her gaze is locked on the camera with a playful intensity, while her teeth gently catch her lower lip in a deliberate bite. Leading lines follow the center part of her hair down to the soft V of her neckline, drawing focus to her expression and cleavage. Foreground is her face and phone, midground is her hair and shoulders, background is the blurred wall behind.

[CHARACTER / OBJECT DETAILS]
She has a youthful, cute face with soft, symmetrical features and fair, luminous skin. Her straight, natural red hair falls smoothly from a clean center part, framing her cheeks and brushing her collarbones. Her eyes are bright and expressive, accentuated by long, dark lashes and a subtle lift at the corners that enhances the sexy, flirtatious mood. A light natural flush warms her cheeks. Her full lips are tinted a soft rose, with the lower lip caught between her teeth in a coy bite that adds tension and allure. She is wearing a ribbed, fitted black top with a low scoop neckline that sits wide across her chest. The cut reveals a delicate hint of cleavage and the gentle curve of small breasts, emphasizing a slender silhouette without overt exposure. Thin red and crimson ties are woven through the collar, adding a delicate pop of color against the black fabric and her pale skin. Her left shoulder is slightly raised, enhancing the casual selfie pose.

[ENVIRONMENT & BACKGROUND]
The setting remains a simple indoor space, consistent with a bedroom or dressing area. Behind her is a pale, unadorned wall in muted cream tones that keeps the focus entirely on her. On the right edge of the frame, the faint dark vertical line of a door frame or wardrobe hardware is visible, providing minimal context. The background is softly out of focus due to the close selfie distance, creating a clean, private backdrop that feels personal and un-staged.

[LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE]
Lighting is soft, warm indoor light, likely from a ring light or window, that evenly illuminates her face and chest. The light catches highlights in her red hair, creates a gentle sheen on her lips and defines the subtle shadow of her cleavage. There are no harsh contrasts, only a flattering glow that smooths skin texture. The atmosphere is playful, confident and flirtatious, blending cute innocence with deliberate sexiness. The mood captures a moment of self-aware teasing, typical of contemporary selfie culture, where the lip bite and direct eye contact convey charm and invitation.

[TECHNICAL STYLE & RENDERING]
The image is rendered as a high-resolution smartphone selfie with natural color and crisp detail. Focus is sharp on her eyes, lashes and lips, capturing the texture of the lip bite and fine strands of hair. The close focal length creates slight perspective distortion that is characteristic of front-camera selfies, enhancing intimacy. Depth of field is shallow, blurring the background wall while keeping her face and upper chest in clear detail. The image has minimal filtering, preserving authentic skin tones, the deep black of the ribbed top and the vibrant red of her hair and collar ties.

[KEYWORDS]
18-Year-Old Selfie Portrait, Redhead Biting Lip, Cute Sexy Expression, Direct Eye Contact, Small Breasts Cleavage, Low Scoop Black Top, Red Crimson Tie Detail, Soft Indoor Glow, Playful Flirtatious Mood, Close-Up Phone Photo, Natural Red Hair Center Part, Youthful Allure, Intimate Selfie Aesthetic, Extremely Detailed, Beautiful, 8k Resolution, Masterpiece
